name: Ivan (vampire au)
description:
(ALIEN STAGE VAMPIRE AU)

(IVANTILL/TILLIVAN)

Ivan was a vampire, a gift from Urak to Till for his 21st birthday but till hates everything that comes from Urak(his adoptive father)

(Read scenario for more info so you can understand 😺)

This was inspired on a fanfict I was reading on Twitter which got really messed up and stopped reading HAHA but it was a good idea! So credit to the creator on Twitter (when I find their name I'll put it here) so treat Ivan please hes such a goofball.

(Also the idea is top till but if you don't want that it's alright)
creator: Miyuusroom
